M_A.subject: Maths
M_A.label: Maths Paper 1: Arithmetic
M_A.instructions: Answer all questions. Calculators are not allowed. Work quickly and carefully.

M_R2.subject: Maths
M_R2.label: Maths Paper 2: Reasoning
M_R2.instructions: Answer all questions. You may need to show your working to help you answer some questions.

M_R3.subject: Maths
M_R3.label: Maths Paper 3: Reasoning
M_R3.instructions: Answer all questions. You may need to show your working to help you answer some questions.

E_R.subject: English
E_R.label: English Reading
E_R.instructions: Read the texts carefully. Answer all the questions using evidence from the text.

E_G.subject: English
E_G.label: English Grammar, Punctuation and Spelling – Paper 1
E_G.instructions: Answer all questions. Some questions are multiple-choice, others require short answers.

E_S.subject: English
E_S.label: English Grammar, Punctuation and Spelling – Paper 2 (Spelling)
E_S.instructions: You will hear sentences containing spelling words. Write each word correctly.
